extension.description: Show current branch pull request CI status checks from GitHub.
command.showChecks.title: GitHub CI Status: Show Checks
command.refresh.title: GitHub CI Status: Refresh
command.openPullRequest.title: GitHub CI Status: Open Pull Request
configuration.title: GitHub CI Status
configuration.autoRefreshIntervalSeconds: Refresh interval for GitHub CI status checks. Set to 0 to disable automatic refresh.
configuration.githubApiBaseUrl.descripti: Base URL for the GitHub REST API. Leave empty for github.com. For GitHub Enterprise Server, set it to `https://your-host/api/v3`.
